generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder channel capturing angular position of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderTopic
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder channel capturing angular position at the output of the gearboxes"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderTopic
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring electrical current of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentTopic
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction
instance MotorEncoderTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance GearboxEncoderTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensor
]

instance MotorCurrentTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance DerivedTorqueTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor, GearboxEncoderSensor, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor, GearboxEncoderSensor, MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor encoder angle data traceable to MQTT topic 'MotorEncoderTopic', representing instantaneous angular position of the motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder angle data traceable to MQTT topic 'GearboxEncoderTopic'"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor data traceable to MQTT topic 'MotorCurrentTopic', used for torque calculations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data traceable to MQTT topic 'DerivedTorqueTopic', computed from sensor data and motor model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity data traceable to MQTT topic 'DerivedAngularVelocityTopic', computed from encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAngularVelocityTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block/path diagram representing the mechanical structure of MABI MAX 100 first rotational axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the double gearbox chain with motor and gearbox encoders"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkSystemDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the overall system dynamics including encoder interactions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Coulomb‑Viscous friction model used in simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Stribeck friction model capturing start–stop behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Dahl friction model for dynamic friction prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable LuGre friction model representing Stribeck-like dynamics with stick‑slip"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker mediating live, one‑way data flow from robot to digital twin via MQTT topics"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataAggregationService
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink environment executing motor, gearbox, and system dynamics models for multi‑physics friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling environment for the engineering structural model of the robot's first rotational axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetMetadataService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell tool providing metadata compliance and integration with industrial asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetMetadataService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization stack rendering real‑time data and insights for operators"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time data aggregation service that collects MQTT data streams for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides AggregatedDataInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Friction identification service performing continuous multi‑physics identification using analytic and data‑driven models"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionParametersInsight, UpdateFrictionModelAction, MaintenanceRecommendationAction
]

instance AssetMetadataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service exposing asset metadata from Asset Administration Shell for integration and compliance"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetMetadataInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service rendering aggregated data and insights on operator dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides AggregatedDataInsight, JointFrictionParametersInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance JointFrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Extraction of joint friction parameters including static, kinetic, and viscous components derived from sensor and model data"
]

instance AggregatedDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time aggregation and visualization of sensor data streams for operator monitoring"
]

instance AssetMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Display of asset metadata compliant with Asset Administration Shell standard"
]

instance UpdateFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic patching of the robot control algorithm with updated friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human‑readable recommendation for maintenance or tool changes to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time operation synchronized with the robot’s sensor cadence; data processed on a per‑sample basis as the robot executes movements (maximum joint speed 75 deg s⁻¹)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A single digital shadow consisting of the structural engineering model, the processing component (running the simulation and data‑calculation models), the data traces (measured and simulated), and the dashboard visualization; all interconnected via the AAS and MQTT channels."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated – the digital shadow reflects the robot during its operational phase, providing real‑time monitoring and model updates."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each data point back to its sensor or simulation source; models rooted in validated engineering specifications (motor constants, gearbox kinematics); continuous identification compensates for wear and temperature effects; white‑box and black‑box models used in parallel; no formal verification beyond traceability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "One‑way MQTT pub/sub connectivity between the robot PLC (Siemens SINUMERIK 840D) and the digital shadow; sensor streams include current and encoder data; AAS references link sensor channels to model modules; no OPC UA or other protocols explicitly used."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of industry 4.0 Asset Administration Shell standard for asset metadata; SysML as modeling language; reliance on Simulink for simulation; adherence to MBSE practices."
]
